name: solar-code-workspace
description: Solar Code — Solar-native terminal coding agent for coding, Korean-language work, and multi-agent execution

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/engine && npm run build -w packages/agents && npm run build -w packages/skills && npm run build -w packages/mcp-server && npm run build -w packages/cli
scripts.link:global: npm run build && cd packages/cli && npm link
scripts.clean: find packages -name dist -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; true
